name: RecruiteeConnector
description: Connects to the Recruitee Applicant Tracking System (ATS) REST API. Surfaces Candidates (full CRUD), Offers (list/get/create), Departments, Pipelines, Stages, Notes, Tags, Tasks, and Hiring Managers, plus KB sync of candidates + offers.

install_fields.label: Company ID
install_fields.help: Your Recruitee Company ID — visible in the URL after login (e.g. https://yourco.recruitee.com → look up Company ID in Settings → Company Profile). Embedded in every API URL path.

install_fields.label: Personal API Token
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Recruitee Personal API Token
install_fields.help: Generate at Settings → Apps & Plugins → Personal API Tokens. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <token> on every request.

install_fields.label: API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Recruitee REST API. The connector appends /{company_id}/<path> automatically.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Recruitee API requests per minute. Default is 60 to match Recruitee's standard quota.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates company_id + api_token and probes /current_user to verify the token resolves to the company.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Recruitee API connectivity by fetching the API token's current user.

apis.name: Get Current User
apis.description: GET /current_user — returns the user record that owns the active API token.

apis.name: List Candidates
apis.description: GET /candidates — search candidates with full-text query, scope, status, and sort options.

apis.name: Get Candidate
apis.description: GET /candidates/{id} — fetch a full candidate record by ID.

apis.name: Create Candidate
apis.description: POST /candidates — create a new candidate, optionally placing them on one or more offers.

apis.name: Update Candidate
apis.description: PATCH /candidates/{id} — partial update of a candidate record.

apis.name: List Offers
apis.description: GET /offers — list job offers (requisitions) filtered by status and scope.

apis.name: Get Offer
apis.description: GET /offers/{id} — fetch a full offer (requisition) by ID.

apis.name: Create Offer
apis.description: POST /offers — create a new job offer (requisition).

apis.name: List Departments
apis.description: GET /departments — list company departments used to scope offers.

apis.name: List Stages
apis.description: GET /offers/{offer_id}/stages — list stages of a specific offer's pipeline.

apis.name: List Notes
apis.description: GET /candidates/{candidate_id}/notes — list notes attached to a candidate.

apis.name: Create Note
apis.description: POST /candidates/{candidate_id}/notes — attach a note to a candidate, optionally restricted to a specific team.

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: GET /tasks — list company tasks (assignable to candidates / offers).
